MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA MILAGROS B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
